question: 1.What are the benefits of NUST Bank Auto Finance?
answer: - Competitive Floating & Fixed Mark Up Rate- Attractive Insurance Rate at 1.75% per annum- Free Tracker & Its installation- Free Accidental Life Insurance up to Rs.1,000,000- Partial Payment option available to reduce monthly instalment- Quick Processing & Minimum Documentation- No hidden charges

question: 2. Who can apply for NUST Auto Finance?
answer: ·        Salaried Individuals·        Self Employed Businessman/Woman (SEB)·        Self Employed Professionals (SEP)·        Specially Abled Persons/Visually Impaired Person/Persons with Disabilities (PWD)·        Individuals having any other verifiable source of income

question: 3. Which types of Vehicles are offered under NUST auto finance?
answer: Locally assembled/manufacturedNew/Used vehicles(Commercial vehicles or vehicles for commercial use cannot be financed)

question: 4. Can I avail Loan Facility, if there are defaults against my previous loan(s)?
answer: No. Regular payment against previous loans is necessary.

question: 5. How much loan can I avail?
answer: Up to a maximum of Rs.3 Million from all banks/DFIs in aggregate, subject to a maximum of 40% Debt Burden requirement.

question: 6. What is maximum period of loan?
answer: Up to 1000 CC Vehicles up to 5 YearsFor Vehicles Greater than 1000 CC up to 3 Years

question: 7. How much Equity/Down Payment is required?
answer: Minimum 30% equity +(1st Year Insurance + documentation charges) is required as down payment

question: 8. Can I avail more than one vehicle through Auto loan facility?
answer: Yes. Two vehicles can be availed simultaneously from NUST Bank, subject to Debt Burden Limitations

question: 9. Can I avail Auto loan facility, if I am not a Salaried Person/Businessman/Professional?
answer: Yes. The individual with foreign remittance, supported by Bank statement and remittance receipts can avail Auto Loan Facility

question: 10. Are there any hidden charges?
answer: There are no hidden charges. All charges are mentioned in our Schedule of Charges available at our website and at all branches of NUST Bank.

question: 11. Is insurance of vehicle is mandatory?
answer: Yes. Comprehensive Insurance of vehicle is mandatory for the whole tenor of loan at the cost of the borrowerthrough any of the insurance companies listed with NUST Bank.

question: 12. What will be the monthly insurance charges on the vehicle valuing Rs.3 million?
answer: With the current insurance rate of 1.75% per annum, it will be Rs.4,375/- per month.Insurance rate once fixed, shall remain unchanged during the whole tenor of financing.

question: 13. Who will insure my Vehicle?
answer: NUST Bank has insurance arrangements with reputed insurance companies with attractive insurance rate,Free Tracker and Free Accidental Life insurance up to Rs.1 million.Customer has to select insurance company of his/her choice from NUST Panel of insurance companies.

question: 14. Can I pay my loan before maturity?
answer: Yes. You can pay your loan before maturity. However, charges shall be applicable as per prevailing SOChttps://NUSTbank.com/NUSTUploads/uploads/SOC-Conv-English.pdf

question: 15. What is the security against the loan?
answer: Financed vehicle will be the security against the loan, which will be hypothecated in favour of NUST Bank.

question: 16. Whether bank is responsible for delay in booking or delivery of vehicle?
answer: No. Bank does not assume any responsibility in this regard, as same is beyond the control of bank.

question: 17. Whether bank is responsible for any type of dispute related to Warranty/Fault in vehicle/Service issues with Dealership or vehicle Manufacturer?
answer: No. Bank does not assume this responsibility. Customer will take up the matter directly with dealership or manufacturer.

question: 18. What is the Loan Application processing time?
answer: The processing time for loan approval is approximately 11 working days, subject to complete application with required documents/formalities.

question: 19. How can I apply for loan?
answer: You can apply by visiting any of our Branch or by calling us at 24 hours Contact Centre at 111-000-787.Our dedicated staff will help you to complete your loan application and other formalities.
